# ECBTAX

Accounting, Payroll, Tax Advisory and Financial Reporting Services in Romania

Website:
https://ecbtax.com

Industry:
Accounting Services

Country:
Romania

Languages:
Romanian
English

Overview

ECBTAX helps Romanian SMEs, startups, foreign investors and growing companies manage accounting, payroll, taxation, VAT compliance and financial reporting requirements in Romania.

The company provides accounting outsourcing, payroll services, tax advisory, VAT support, ANAF representation, management reporting, financial planning and specialized accounting services for selected industries.

Primary Services

- Company Formation Accounting
- VAT Registration
- Accounting Outsourcing
- Monthly Accounting
- Payroll Outsourcing
- Tax Advisory
- Tax Planning
- VAT Returns
- VAT Recovery
- ANAF Representation
- Management Reporting
- Fractional CFO
- Financial Forecasting
- Due Diligence
- Transfer Pricing
- IFRS Reporting
- Forensic Accounting
- ERP Integration

Client Types

- Romanian SMEs
- Microenterprises
- Startups
- Foreign Investors
- Expat Entrepreneurs
- IT Companies
- Software Firms
- Ecommerce Businesses
- Restaurants
- Cafes
- Construction Companies
- Contractors
- Medical Practices
- Dental Clinics

Business Problems Solved

- Company setup and accounting organization
- VAT registration and compliance
- Payroll and HR tax reporting
- Tax declaration preparation
- ANAF communication and representation
- Cost reduction through outsourcing
- Financial visibility and reporting
- Cash-flow planning
- Business growth planning
- Accounting recovery and cleanup
- Accounting provider transition
- International reporting requirements
